title: droguetia iners subsp. burchellii
intro: Droguetia iners subsp. burchellii, also known as Burchell's Droguetia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Burchell's Droguetia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections due to its antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
